source_pr.title: importinto: move post-process code from disttask pkg to importer pkg
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: ref #49883

Problem Summary:

### What changed and how does it work?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [x] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
do a basic import, make sure everything is ok. as this PR only moves code, will not add more test here.
- [ ] No need to test
  > - [ ] I checked and no code files have been changed.
  > <!-- Or your custom  "No need to test" reasons -->

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR primarily moves/refactors IMPORT INTO post-process logic (e.g. allocator rebase and checksum verification) from the disttask `importinto` package into the executor `importer` package, along with related test/build updates. The only evidence in this case is a Bazel `race = "on"` line, which does not identify a concrete flaky trigger, so we keep a conservative fallback classification.
fix_pattern: Refactor IMPORT INTO implementation by moving post-process logic from `pkg/disttask/importinto` to `pkg/executor/importer` (plus related test/build updates).

evidence: files: pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/scheduler/scheduler_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/table_test.go, pkg/disttask/framework/storage/task_table.go, pkg/disttask/framework/testutil/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/framework/testutil/task_util.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/BUILD.bazel, pkg/disttask/importinto/subtask_executor.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/subtask_executor_test.go, pkg/disttask/importinto/task_executor.go, pkg/executor/importer/BUILD.bazel, pkg/executor/importer/table_import.go, pkg/executor/importer/table_import_test.go, pkg/executor/importer/table_import_testkit_test.go, pkg/util/sqlexec/BUILD.bazel, pkg/util/sqlexec/restricted_sql_executor.go, tests/realtikvtest/importintotest/job_test.go
